summary: Backend API testing after modular refactoring - All 30 backend tests PASSED. Frontend testing revealed and fixed a SelectItem value error on Products page. All core functionality working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem with empty value causing runtime error 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'

critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successful - all routers (auth, products, doctors, cart, cms, public) properly modularized and working
JWT authentication flow working correctly with token creation and validation
All public endpoints (health-concerns, testimonials, newsletter) accessible without auth
Protected endpoints (cart, wishlist, /auth/me) properly require Bearer token
test_credentials: test@example.com / test123 (exists in DB, login successful)
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring complete and all APIs verified. ProductListPage.js SelectItem fix applied. Auth flow, cart, products, doctors, CMS, public routes all working. Products page shows 12 seeded products.

backend_tests_summary.TestProductRoutes: 5 tests - PASSED (list, pagination, search, 404, advanced search)
backend_tests_summary.TestAuthRoutes: 6 tests - PASSED (register, duplicate, login valid/invalid, me without/with token)
backend_tests_summary.TestCartRoutes: 4 tests - PASSED (cart auth required, get cart, add invalid product, add without auth)
backend_tests_summary.TestWishlistRoutes: 2 tests - PASSED (wishlist auth required, get wishlist)

frontend_tests_summary.Auth Page: PASS - Login/Register forms working, login successful with test credentials
frontend_tests_summary.Products Page: PASS (after fix) - Products grid, filters working
frontend_tests_summary.Doctors Page: PASS - 3 doctors displayed with View Profile buttons
